title: terminalis neocaledonica
intro: Terminalis neocaledonica, also known as the New Caledonia terminalia, is a plant species native to the Pacific island of New Caledonia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains tannins and other compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Terminalis neocaledonica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the bark is typically dried and made into a tea or infused in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
